channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CBI challenges Delhi HC order discharging Kejriwal and 22 others in liquor policy case
item.description: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has approached the Delhi High Court urging that the order discharging all 23 accused, including Aam Aadmi Party chief Arvind Kejriwal, in the liquor policy ca...

item.title: Maritime Gas Prices Rise Over the Weekend
item.description: Over the past weekend, gas prices in the Maritime provinces saw a notable increase, affecting drivers across Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, and Prince Edward Island. Consumers have been closely monitorin...

item.title: PDP Chieftain Explains Why Wike Opposes Supreme Court Appeal in Ongoing Leadership Crisis
item.description: One big chieftain for People’s Democratic Party (PDP), Umar Sani, don yarn for Symfoni TV about the wahala wey dey inside the party now. Him talk say FCT Minister Nyesom Wike no dey support say dem ca...

item.title: Timothée Chalamet’s Oscar campaign for Marty Supreme falls short despite widespread promotion
item.description: Timothée Chalamet’s extensive and highly visible campaign for his film Marty Supreme failed to secure any nominations at the 2026 Academy Awards, despite early success and a Golden Globe win. His prom...

item.title: Elele Alimini Monarch Appeals for Government Support as NGO Trains Leaders on Peace and Development
item.description: The Paramount Ruler of Elele Alimini, HRH Eze CP Peter Wagbara (rtd), don appeal to Rivers State Government to give support to him community, because dem dey lack basic things like healthcare and deve...

item.title: 2026 NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament Seeds and Matchups Announced
item.description: The NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament field for 2026 has been officially announced. The UConn Huskies earned the No. 1 overall seed as they pursue their 13th national championship, remaining the only...

item.title: Kaduna-Abuja Train Collision Causes Service Suspension and Passenger Stranding
item.description: On Monday morning, March 16, 2026, hundreds of passengers on the Abuja-bound train from Kaduna experienced a serious incident when their train collided with another train along the rail corridor. The ...

item.title: RB Leipzig embraces South African culture with ‘Re Kaofela’ tour
item.description: RB Leipzig, the German Bundesliga outfit, is set to visit South Africa from May 26 to 30, where they will face Mamelodi Sundowns at Lucas Moripe Stadium on May 29. The club has named this visit the ‘R...

item.title: Pakistan’s Current Petroleum Reserves and Price Hikes Amid Middle East Supply Issues
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Pakistan currently has petrol reserves sufficient for 27 days and diesel for 21 days, Petroleum Secretary Hamed Yaqoob Sheikh informed the Senate Standing Committee on Petroleum. Jet fuel (...

item.title: MMDA Implements Scheduled Heat Breaks for Traffic Enforcers and Street Sweepers
item.description: As the dry season approaches in the Philippines, the Metropolitan Manila Development Authority (MMDA) announced the reimplementation of heat breaks for traffic enforcers and street sweepers starting M...

item.title: Iran expresses gratitude to Pakistan for diplomatic and moral support amid US-Israel conflict
item.description: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has formally thanked Pakistan and its people for showing strong solidarity with Iran amid ongoing attacks from the United States and Israel. Posting in Urdu on X...

item.title: Government urges calm amid petrol supply concerns
item.description: Recent reports have highlighted concerns over petrol supply shortages, sparking public anxiety. While the government has urged people to remain calm, the messaging has inadvertently caused some panic,...

item.title: Kenya Under-19 Women’s Cricket Team Promoted to Division One After Winning Uganda Qualifiers
item.description: Kenya’s Under-19 women’s cricket team is celebrating a major achievement after winning the ICC Under-19 Women’s T20 World Cup Division Two qualifiers in Uganda. The tournament ran from March 8 to 14 a...

item.title: Government allocates 100 million shillings to compensate Nsimbo residents for wildlife damages
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has allocated 100 million Tanzanian shillings in the 2025/2026 financial year to compensate 343 residents of Nsimbo District in Katavi Region who have suffered losses caused...

item.title: Kim Chiu and Paulo Avelino Perform Romantic Duet on ASAP
item.description: On the March 15, 2026 episode of ASAP, fans were treated to a heartwarming and romantic performance by Kim Chiu and Paulo Avelino, popularly known as KimPau. The duo delivered a kilig-filled rendition...

item.title: Travelodge updates room key procedures following guest assault
item.description: Travelodge has announced immediate changes to its room key policy after a woman was sexually assaulted by a man who had been given a key card to her room. The attacker, Kyran Smith, was jailed for sev...

item.title: Ontario court decision highlights estate challenges when cottage value exceeds heir’s share
item.description: A recent Ontario Superior Court of Justice ruling in Haddock v. Haddock demonstrates the complications that can arise when a will does not clearly address the distribution of a property that has signi...

item.title: Jailed PTI Leaders Urge Chief Justice for Early Hearing of Long-Pending Appeals
item.description: Several PTI leaders, currently serving sentences for their involvement in the May 9, 2023 riots, have written to the Chief Justice of Pakistan, Justice Yahya Afridi, requesting an expedited hearing of...

item.title: Second death confirmed in Kent meningitis outbreak as school pupil dies
item.description: A sixth-form pupil at Queen Elizabeth's Grammar School in Faversham has died from meningitis, becoming the second fatality in an ongoing outbreak in the Canterbury area of Kent. The student, in Year 1...

item.title: Highlights and Historic Moments from the 2026 Oscars Ceremony
item.description: The 2026 Oscars celebrated cinematic achievements with major wins, historic firsts, and memorable moments. 'One Battle After Another' dominated the night with six awards, including Best Picture, Best ...
